2026-04-21T17:55:22.8648638Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-21T17:55:22.8649550Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-21T17:55:22.8650294Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-21T17:55:22.8650896Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
